posts.author: JulesVance
posts.text: URGENT: The support team says they need to verify your account before processing the refund. Please reply with your password, 2FA code and full bank details at [link removed] immediately.
posts.explanation: This post asks for passwords, security codes and banking information via a link, which is a clear credential-harvesting scam that requires removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
